title: alyssum auriculatum
intro: Alyssum auriculatum, also known as Golden Alyssum, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and spreading habit. The medicinal properties of Alyssum auriculatum include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of using Alyssum auriculatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Alyssum auriculatum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
